stemHtml: An aeroplane is equipped with an autopilot and an auto-throttle. When the altitude hold mode (ALT HOLD) is active…

options.a: the IAS is maintained constant by the auto-throttle system.
options.b: the IAS is maintained constant by the autopilot by means of elevator.
options.c: the TAS is maintained constant by the auto-throttle system.
options.d: the TAS is maintained constant by the autopilot by means of elevator.
